title: Artifact notification types for document and diagram creation/update
purpose: Defines TypeScript interfaces for artifact notifications received from MCP responses, specifically for document and diagram creation or updates.
module_context: Exports a single interface ArtifactNotification that describes the structure of artifact creation/update notifications including type, artifact type, ID, and name.

steps.content: Define the structure for artifact notifications.
Specify that notifications have a type field restricted to 'created' or 'updated'.
Specify that notifications have an artifactType field restricted to 'document' or 'diagram'.
Include an ID field for identifying the artifact.
Include a name field for the artifact's display name.
